root_text.an4.92:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo lābhī hoti ajjhattaṁ cetosamathassa, na lābhī adhipaññādhammavipassanāya.
root_text.an4.92:1.4: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo lābhī hoti adhipaññādhammavipassanāya, na lābhī ajjhattaṁ cetosamathassa.
root_text.an4.92:1.5: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo na ceva lābhī hoti ajjhattaṁ cetosamathassa na ca lābhī adhipaññādhammavipassanāya.
root_text.an4.92:1.6: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo lābhī ceva hoti ajjhattaṁ cetosamathassa lābhī ca adhipaññādhammavipassanāya.
root_text.an4.92:1.7: Ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro puggalā santo saṁvijjamānā lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an4.92:1.1: “Mendicants, these four individuals are found in the world.
translation_text.an4.92:1.3: One individual has internal serenity of heart, but not the higher wisdom of discernment of principles.
translation_text.an4.92:1.4: One individual has the higher wisdom of discernment of principles, but not internal serenity of heart.
translation_text.an4.92:1.5: One individual has neither internal serenity of heart, nor the higher wisdom of discernment of principles.
translation_text.an4.92:1.6: One individual has both internal serenity of heart, and the higher wisdom of discernment of principles.
translation_text.an4.92:1.7: These are the four individuals found in the world.”

variant_text.an4.92:1.5: puggalo na ceva → puggalo neva (bj, sya-all)
